validation: Reviewed the diff with git status --short, git diff --check, and the new issue-228 evidence files.

residual_risks: The change is test-and-evidence only; the remaining risk is future corpus drift if new vectors are added without updating the matrix helper and markdown artifact.
The local .venv was used because the host interpreter does not have pytest installed.
